name: @jjlabsio/create-jjlabs-app
description: CLI to scaffold a new JJLabs app from the starter template

scripts.test:e2e: rm -rf test-project && pnpm build && node dist/index.js test-project
scripts.publish:npm: pnpm build && find template \( -name node_modules -o -name .next -o -name .turbo \) -type d -prune -exec rm -rf {} + && npm publish --provenance --access public
